data.title: Create emit-review-result.sh review event wrapper
data.description:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/scripts/emit-review-result.sh that assembles review_result event data from artifact files and CLI args, then calls emit-review-event.sh.

**CLI args (orchestrator in-memory state)**:
--tier-original, --tier-final, --pass-fail, --overlay-security (true/false), --overlay-performance (true/false), --resolution-code-changes (int), --resolution-defenses (int), --revision-cycles (int)

**File-sourced data**:
1. reviewer-findings.json from $(get_artifacts_dir): extract dimension_scores from scores{}, compute finding_counts_by_severity and finding_counts_by_dimension from findings[] array (counts only, no finding text)
2. test-gate-status from $(get_artifacts_dir): read line 1 (passed/failed/timeout), default to "unknown" if file missing

**Invocation**: Call emit-review-event.sh via absolute path: SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)" then "$SCRIPT_DIR/emit-review-event.sh" review_result '<json>'

**Best-effort**: If emit-review-event.sh fails, log warning to stderr but return 0.

## TDD Requirement

GREEN — Task 1's RED tests pass after implementation.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/emit-review-result.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/emit-review-result.sh
- [ ] All 7 tests pass (behavioral gate)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-emit-review-result.sh
